goal: All character walk cycles reach 75+ score in animation-scorer.ts. Enzyme idle animation feels alive.

backlog.title: Player walk cycle — 4 frame down/up/left/right
acceptance: 4 frames per direction (16 total)
Same palette across all frames
Left and right frames NOT perfect mirrors
Head bob: 1px up on stride frames
Foot swing visible even at S=3 scale
backlog.currentState: 2-frame walk implemented in drawPlayer(). Needs upgrade to 4 frames.
backlog.technique: walkFrame alternates between leg positions. Frame 0: right foot forward. Frame 1: neutral. Frame 2: left foot forward. Frame 3: neutral.

backlog.title: Player idle animation — 2-frame breathe with blink
acceptance: Neutral and breathe-in frames
Breathe: torso moves up 1px
Blink frame: eyes closed (dark rectangle) every 6 seconds (36 idle frames at 6fps)
backlog.technique: If walkFrame === 0 and player.idle for 5000ms, trigger blink sequence

backlog.title: Enzyme floating idle — bob up/down with blinking
acceptance: Float bob: 2px sinusoidal vertical movement
Blink every 4-8 seconds
Different mood expressions per game state
Happy by default, annoyed during hints, excited on correct answer
backlog.currentState: Enzyme rendered in game, but float animation needs timing tuning

backlog.title: Elliot walk cycle — mismatched sock swing
backlog.completionNote: 2-frame walk with mismatched sock color shift implemented in drawElliot(). Score ~6.5/10.

backlog.title: Ben walk cycle — sandwich sway
backlog.completionNote: 2-frame walk with sandwich armSwing implemented in drawBen(). Score ~6.5/10.

backlog.title: Alex walk cycle — coffee slosh
backlog.completionNote: 2-frame walk with coffeeSlosh implemented in drawAlex(). Score ~6.5/10.

backlog.title: Henry flicker animation — holographic glitch
backlog.completionNote: 3-frame flicker with opacity variation implemented in drawHenry(). Score ~7.0/10.

backlog.title: Lesson node pulse animation — per realm
backlog.completionNote: 2-frame on/off pulse for all 4 realms. Add staggered phase offset per node position — TODO.

backlog.title: Stagger node animation phase by tile position
acceptance: Use (tx*7+ty*3) % animTotal for phase offset
Adjacent nodes should never blink in sync
backlog.technique: In drawTile for lesson nodes: const nodePhase = (tx*7+ty*3) % 2; replace animFrame with (animFrame + nodePhase) % 2

backlog.title: Water tile animations — smooth wave motion
backlog.completionNote: Sin-wave animated for all 4 realm water types. Realm 3 has star twinkling.

backlog.title: Dialogue box typewriter effect — current character flash
acceptance: Last typed character blinks while typing
Cursor block appears after last char
Blinking cursor stops when text complete

backlog.title: Screen transitions — zone-accent-colored wipe
acceptance: Entering new zone: fade to realm accent color then fade in
Kitchen to upstairs: dark fade
Lesson node entry: bright flash then fade to lesson UI

backlog.title: Player interaction animation — 2-frame exclamation
acceptance: ! symbol appears above player on NPC approach
Bounces 2px up then down over 4 frames
Uses white on black bubble (Undertale style)

backlog.title: NPC idle animations — all 4 NPCs
acceptance: Elliot: adjust glasses every 8 seconds (arm moves to face)
Ben: eating animation (sandwich raises to mouth) every 10 seconds
Alex: coffee sip every 6 seconds
Henry: glitch-flicker burst every 12 seconds (full body glitch for 4 frames)

backlog.title: Mitochondria T-tile animation — ATP production glow
acceptance: ATP synthase dots glow in sequence (left → center → right)
Inner matrix breathes (subtle brightness cycle)
Outer membrane pulses with teal accent

backlog.title: Path tiles animated motor protein — staggered by tile X
backlog.completionNote: Motor protein animated in Realm 1 path tiles. Speed: 35 game-pixels/second.

backlog.title: Boss gate animation — horror buildup
acceptance: Normal: slow red pulse
Player within 5 tiles: faster pulse + crack glow increases
Player within 2 tiles: screen shakes 1px
Player touches: flash white then lesson UI

backlog.title: Enzyme talking animation — mouth moves with dialogue
acceptance: Mouth alternates open/closed every 100ms while dialogue is playing
Stops moving when player is reading

backlog.title: Lesson complete celebration animation
acceptance: Lesson node changes to gold/completed appearance
Particle burst from node (8 particles scatter in circle)
Particles are realm-accent colored
Enzyme does excited animation for 1 second

backlog.title: Opening cutscene timing refinement
acceptance: Dialogue pacing: 30ms per character
Scene transitions: 800ms dark fade
Mom walk animation uses 4-frame cycle not 2-frame
Player sleep animation: eyes close, slight body settle
